    oh = set(v[(v["Close"] / v["MA200"] > 1.30) & ((v["state"] == 5) | (v["D_RSI"] > 0.75))]["time"])
    sig = sig.copy()
    sig.loc[sig["time"].isin(oh) & sig["play_type"].isin(BUY_TIERS_V11), "play_type"] = "AVOID_overheated"
    return sig

def run_leg(sig, sff, cash_etf, universe, label):
    s = sig if universe is None else sig[sig["ticker"].isin(universe)].copy()
    pr = prices_B if universe is None else {tk: prices_B[tk] for tk in universe if tk in prices_B}
    lq = liq_map_B if universe is None else {k: v for k, v in liq_map_B.items() if k[0] in universe}
    extra = dict(sector_limit_per_sector={8: 4}, sector_cap_exempt_tiers=SECTOR_CAP_EXEMPT) if universe is None else {}
    nav, _ = simulate(s, pr, vni_dates_B, allowed_tiers=TIER_BAL, max_positions=MAX_POS, hold_days=45,
        stop_loss=-0.20, min_hold=2, slippage=0.001, init_nav=BOOK_NAV, ticker_sector_map=sec_map,
        tier_weights=TIER_WEIGHTS_V11, deposit_annual=DEPOSIT, borrow_annual=BORROW, state_by_date=sff,
        cash_etf_states=cash_etf, vn30_underlying=vn30_underlying, etf_mgmt_fee_annual=0.0,
        etf_tracking_drag_annual=0.0, etf_rebalance_friction=0.0015, open_prices=open_prices,
        t1_open_exec=True, **{**LIQ, "liquidity_lookup": lq}, **extra, name=label)
    nav["time"] = pd.to_datetime(nav["time"]); return nav.set_index("time")["nav"]

def run_v5(state_name, cash_etf):
    sdf, sff = state_data[state_name]
    sig_v = apply_overheat(apply_sv_tight(sig_canon, sff), sdf)
    nb = run_leg(sig_v, sff, cash_etf, None, f"{state_name}_BAL")
    nv = run_leg(sig_v, sff, cash_etf, top30, f"{state_name}_VN30")
    return nb + nv

print("\n[3] Run combos...")
results = {}
for sn, cfg, lbl in [("DT_4gate", ETF_KELLY, "V5_DT4_KELLY"), ("DT4_MACRO", ETF_KELLY, "V5_DT4MACRO_KELLY"),
                     ("DT_4gate", ETF_BASE, "V1_DT4_BASE"), ("DT4_MACRO", ETF_BASE, "V1_DT4MACRO_BASE")]:
    print(f"  [{lbl}] {sn} + {'KELLY' if cfg==ETF_KELLY else 'BASE'}...")
    results[lbl] = run_v5(sn, cfg)
bh = pd.DataFrame({"time": list(vn30_underlying.keys()), "Close": list(vn30_underlying.values())}).sort_values("time")
bh["nav"] = TOTAL_NAV * bh["Close"] / bh["Close"].iloc[0]; results["B&H"] = bh.set_index("time")["nav"]

def metrics(s):
    init, final = s.iloc[0], s.iloc[-1]; yrs = (s.index[-1] - s.index[0]).days / 365.25
    cagr = (final / init) ** (1 / yrs) - 1; d = s.pct_change().dropna()
    sh = d.mean() / d.std() * np.sqrt(252) if d.std() > 0 else 0
    dd = ((s - s.expanding().max()) / s.expanding().max()).min()
    return dict(final=final / 1e9, cagr=cagr * 100, sharpe=sh, maxdd=dd * 100, calmar=cagr / (-dd) if dd < 0 else 0)

print("\n" + "=" * 96)
print(f"  {'Combo':<20}{'Final':>10}{'CAGR':>8}{'IS14-19':>9}{'OOS20-26':>10}{'DD':>8}{'Sharpe':>8}{'Calmar':>8}")
for n in ["V5_DT4_KELLY", "V5_DT4MACRO_KELLY", "V1_DT4_BASE", "V1_DT4MACRO_BASE", "B&H"]:
    s = results[n]; m = metrics(s)
    mis = metrics(s.loc["2014-01-01":"2019-12-31"]) if n != "B&H" else None
    moos = metrics(s.loc["2020-01-01":"2026-05-15"]) if n != "B&H" else None
    isv = f"{mis['cagr']:>+7.2f}%" if mis else f"{'-':>8}"
    oosv = f"{moos['cagr']:>+8.2f}%" if moos else f"{'-':>9}"
    print(f"  {n:<20}{m['final']:>9.2f}B{m['cagr']:>+7.2f}%{isv}{oosv}{m['maxdd']:>+7.1f}%{m['sharpe']:>8.2f}{m['calmar']:>8.2f}")

def dpp(a, b, lo=None, hi=None):
    na, nb = results[a], results[b]
    if lo: na, nb = na.loc[lo:hi], nb.loc[lo:hi]
    return metrics(na)["cagr"] - metrics(nb)["cagr"]
print("\n  MACRO vs no-macro:")
print(f"  KELLY (V5):  Full {dpp('V5_DT4MACRO_KELLY','V5_DT4_KELLY'):+.2f}pp  IS {dpp('V5_DT4MACRO_KELLY','V5_DT4_KELLY','2014','2019'):+.2f}pp  OOS {dpp('V5_DT4MACRO_KELLY','V5_DT4_KELLY','2020','2026-05-15'):+.2f}pp")
print(f"  BASE  (V1):  Full {dpp('V1_DT4MACRO_BASE','V1_DT4_BASE'):+.2f}pp  IS {dpp('V1_DT4MACRO_BASE','V1_DT4_BASE','2014','2019'):+.2f}pp  OOS {dpp('V1_DT4MACRO_BASE','V1_DT4_BASE','2020','2026-05-15'):+.2f}pp")
periods = [("14-17", "2014-01-01", "2017-12-31"), ("18-19", "2018-01-01", "2019-12-31"),
           ("20-22", "2020-01-01", "2022-12-31"), ("23-26", "2023-01-01", "2026-05-15")]
print("\n  Sub-period CAGR (KELLY):")
print(f"  {'Combo':<20}" + "".join(f"{p:>9}" for p, _, _ in periods))
for n in ["V5_DT4_KELLY", "V5_DT4MACRO_KELLY"]:
    print(f"  {n:<20}" + "".join(f"{metrics(results[n].loc[sd:ed])['cagr']:>+8.2f}%" for _, sd, ed in periods))
pd.DataFrame(results).to_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR, "data/v5_macro_integrated_nav.csv"))
print("\n  Saved -> data/v5_macro_integrated_nav.csv")
print("DONE.")

content.text:
Kết quả rất tốt — và đây là câu trả lời quan trọng: **lớp macro chuyển thành alpha thật dưới đòn bẩy Kelly**, không chỉ là hiệu ứng pure-index.

## Bước (b) — Macro layer tích hợp vào sổ cổ phiếu thật (2014–2026, 50B)

| Combo | CAGR | IS 14-19 | OOS 20-26 | MaxDD | Sharpe | Calmar |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| V5 DT4 (KELLY) | +19.19% | +16.15% | +22.11% | −19.1% | 1.19 | 1.00 |
| **V5 DT4+MACRO** | **+20.06%** | +16.00% | **+24.01%** | −20.9% | **1.24** | 0.96 |
| V1 DT4 (BASE) | +19.03% | +14.80% | +23.14% | −17.8% | 1.29 | 1.07 |
| **V1 DT4+MACRO** | **+19.66%** | +14.77% | **+24.44%** | **−17.3%** | **1.33** | **1.14** |
| B&H | +11.42% | — | — | −45.3% | 0.69 | 0.25 |

**MACRO vs no-macro:** KELLY **+0.88pp Full / +1.90pp OOS**; BASE **+0.63pp Full / +1.31pp OOS**.

Alpha tập trung ở **2020–2022 (+4pp: 28.69%→32.70%)** — đúng cơ chế: chân phục hồi (SBV cắt + US yên → tái nhập COVID sớm) + chân phòng thủ 2022 hikes. IS 2014-19 trung tính (ít khủng hoảng vĩ mô). Macro chỉ đổi state ~106/3089 ngày modern → can thiệp ít, đúng chỗ.

**Khác biệt KELLY vs BASE (trung thực):**
- **BASE = thắng sạch**: +0.63pp CAGR, DD *tốt hơn* (−17.3 vs −17.8), Calmar *tốt hơn* (1.14 vs 1.07), Sharpe ↑.
- **KELLY = nhiều return hơn nhưng đánh đổi rủi ro**: +0.88pp CAGR & Sharpe ↑, nhưng DD *xấu hơn* (−20.9 vs −19.1), Calmar ↓ nhẹ — vì đòn bẩy 100% khuếch đại lần tái nhập phục hồi.

**Caveat phải nói rõ:** alpha modern tập trung vào **2020 + 2022** (số sự kiện khủng hoảng vĩ mô độc lập trong cửa sổ V5 rất ít) → độ tin cậy *vừa phải*, không cao. Causal: SBV refi là ngày công bố, US lag T-1, không look-ahead.

## Kết luận tổng hợp (a)+(b)
1. **(a) Confirmed easing** (quy tắc tiên nghiệm, không fit lịch sử): pure-index Full +19.86%, modern hết drag, 2011 +13.49%, COVID giữ nguyên — Sharpe lên đều.
2. **(b)** Macro layer là **alpha thật**: dùng với **BASE → khuyến nghị mạnh** (tăng return + giảm rủi ro); với **KELLY** → tăng return nhưng chấp nhận DD nhỉnh hơn.

input.new_string:
- OPEN next: (a) integrate #2 trend overlay into real Kelly stock book (V5) — does +1pp hold?

## CONSOLIDATED MACRO OVERLAY — rates/US-panic/SBV fused into ONE layer (2026-05-29)

User insight: crisis years show rate spikes — can rates aid regime detection? Validated YES on real data. Then user asked to CONSOLIDATE with existing rules (US panic, SBV policy) into one module to avoid rule-sprawl. Files: `test_rates_regime_signal.py`, `sim_dt4g_macro_overlay.py`, `test_v5_macro_integrated.py`.

**Rate signal validation** (`test_rates_regime_signal.py`, real `macro_daily.csv` lending_rate 2000+, lagged 21d, causal): rate 6m-MOMENTUM is best (IC −0.11/−0.15/−0.16 at 20/60/120d). Rates RISING fast → fwd60 −2.5%/fwd120 −3.8% (vs flat +10.5%); rates PEAK→fall → fwd120 **+17.1%** (vs +8.6% avg) = recovery signal. Level matters less than momentum (real_rate IC≈0). BUT only 6/18 CRISIS onsets preceded by high rates → COMPLEMENT (catches inflation/tightening crises 2008/2011/2022, NOT shock crises COVID/2018).

**ONE consolidated module** (`sim_dt4g_macro_overlay.py`) — avoids overlap: Pillar A DOMESTIC MONEY = SBV *refi* 6m-momentum (uses `sbv_macro_overlay.SBV_REFI_EVENTS`; subsumes both "SBV policy" + domestic-rate finding = same driver, no double-count). Pillar B US PANIC = VIX+SPX-DD validated 3-tier (`analyze_us_vn_linkage.py`). Folds in v3.4b BULL-AWARE BYPASS (VNI r6m>15% & >MA200 → ignore Pillar B, keep A; fixes US-override-wrong-in-bull). DXY omitted (weakest, overlaps US). Asymmetric: stress→CAP state ceiling (de-risk early); SBV-cut+US-calm→FLOOR NEUTRAL (re-enter early, rate-driven fix for V-recovery lag that breadth-thrust failed).
- **(a) Confirmed-easing refinement** — NON-OVERFIT a-priori rule (NOT fitted to history): easing must persist ≥10 sessions (same dwell as trend) AND price turn up (Close>Close[t−10]). Avoids re-levering into falling market on monetary signal alone. Pure-index result: Full +19.86% (vs +19.17% base), modern +14.53% (drag REMOVED, was −0.23pp), 2011 +13.49% (vs base +1.44%, DD −23.3→−8.3), COVID +20.71% (vs +16.39%), GFC Sharpe 1.39→1.80. Sharpe 1.25→1.37. Net positive full+modern.
- **(b) Integrated V5/V1 Kelly test** (`test_v5_macro_integrated.py`, 2014-26, macro injected as cap/floor on DT4 state → differs ~106/3089 modern days, 95 de-risk/11 re-risk): MACRO = **REAL ALPHA under leverage**. KELLY (V5): +19.19%→**20.06%** (+0.88pp Full, **+1.90pp OOS20-26**), Sharpe 1.19→1.24, but DD −19.1→−20.9 / Calmar 1.00→0.96 WORSE (Kelly amplifies recovery re-entry risk). BASE (V1): +19.03→19.66 (+0.63pp Full, +1.31pp OOS), DD −17.8→**−17.3 BETTER**, Calmar 1.07→**1.14**, Sharpe ↑ = CLEAN WIN. Alpha concentrated 2020-22 (+4pp: 28.69→32.70 = COVID recovery + 2022 defense); IS14-19 neutral. **CAVEAT: few independent macro-crisis events in modern V5 window (essentially 2020+2022) → confidence MODERATE not high.** Causal (refi=announce date, US lag T-1). **RECOMMEND: adopt macro layer with BASE (return+risk both better); with KELLY = more return at slightly higher DD (return-seeker choice).** NAV: `data/v5_macro_integrated_nav.csv`, `data/dt4g_macro_overlay_*`.

KELLY (V5): +19.19%→**20.06%** (+0.88pp Full, **+1.90pp OOS20-26**), Sharpe 1.19→1.24, but DD −19.1→−20.9 / Calmar 1.00→0.96 WORSE (Kelly amplifies recovery re-entry risk). BASE (V1): +19.03→19.66 (+0.63pp Full, +1.31pp OOS), DD −17.8→**−17.3 BETTER**, Calmar 1.07→**1.14**, Sharpe ↑ = CLEAN WIN. Alpha concentrated 2020-22 (+4pp: 28.69→32.70 = COVID recovery + 2022 defense); IS14-19 neutral. **CAVEAT: few independent macro-crisis events in modern V5 window (essentially 2020+2022) → confidence MODERATE not high.** Causal (refi=announce date, US lag T-1). **RECOMMEND: adopt macro layer with BASE (return+risk both better); with KELLY = more return at slightly higher DD (return-seeker choice).** NAV: `data/v5_macro_integrated_nav.csv`, `data/dt4g_macro_overlay_*`.

content.text:
Đã hoàn tất cả hai bước và lưu memory. Tóm tắt cuối:

## Bước (a) — Tinh chỉnh chân easing (không look-ahead)
Quy tắc tiên nghiệm (persist ≥10 phiên + giá tự xác nhận `Close > Close[t−10]`), **không dò tham số trên lịch sử đã thấy** → pure-index **Full +19.86%, Sharpe 1.37**, modern hết drag (+14.53%), 2011 lên +13.49%, COVID giữ +20.71%. Tất cả cải thiện từ một quy tắc nhân quả đặt trước.

## Bước (b) — Macro layer trong sổ Kelly thật = alpha thật
- **KELLY (V5): +0.88pp Full / +1.90pp OOS** (Sharpe 1.19→1.24) — nhưng DD nhỉnh hơn (−19.1→−20.9), Calmar giảm nhẹ → đòn bẩy khuếch đại lần tái nhập.
- **BASE (V1): +0.63pp Full, DD *tốt hơn* (−17.3), Calmar 1.07→1.14, Sharpe ↑** → **thắng sạch**.
- Alpha tập trung 2020–2022 (+4pp). Caveat trung thực: ít sự kiện khủng hoảng vĩ mô độc lập trong cửa sổ modern → **độ tin cậy vừa phải**.

## Kiến trúc đã gom đúng yêu cầu "tránh chồng chéo"
Một module: Pillar A (SBV refi + rate-momentum gộp làm một) + Pillar B (US panic VIX/SPX) + bull-aware bypass (v3.4b) gấp vào trong, DXY bỏ. Bất đối xứng cap/floor.

**Khuyến nghị**: adopt macro layer cho **các hệ BASE (V1–V4)** — cải thiện cả return lẫn rủi ro; với **KELLY (V5)** dùng nếu ưu tiên return và chấp nhận DD nhỉnh hơn.

**Files mới**: `test_rates_regime_signal.py`, `sim_dt4g_macro_overlay.py`, `vnindex_5state_dt4_macro.csv`, `test_v5_macro_integrated.py`, `data/v5_macro_integrated_nav.csv`, `data/dt4g_macro_overlay_report.md`.

Hai hướng tự nhiên tiếp theo nếu bạn muốn: **(1)** validate độ bền bằng walk-forward / stress chi phí TC cao hơn cho macro layer (vì alpha tập trung 2020-22, cần kiểm tra không overfit sự kiện); **(2)** deploy macro state vào paper-trade shadow (như A/B V12_DT4 đang chạy) để xác nhận live trước khi đưa vào production. Bạn muốn đi tiếp không?

content.text:
Bắt đầu **bước (1) — validate robustness**. Vì alpha tập trung 2020–22, mối lo chính là *overfit vào vài sự kiện* và *nhạy tham số*. Tôi sẽ kiểm 3 thứ:
1. **Parameter sensitivity** (pure-index, nhanh): thay đổi ngưỡng US/SBV, cửa sổ confirm, lag → alpha phải là *plateau* chứ không phải *spike* (bằng chứng chống overfit chính).
2. **Drop-year (leave-one-out)**: alpha modern đến từ nhiều năm hay chỉ 2020+2022.
3. **Cost stress** (integrated V5/V1, TC cao): alpha đòn bẩy có sống sót không.

Let me build the validation harness (self-contained, parameterized).

input.content:
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""
validate_macro_overlay.py
=========================
Robustness validation of the consolidated macro overlay (step 1).
Anti-overfit checks on the FAST pure-index sim:
  A. Parameter sensitivity (one-at-a-time): vary US/SBV thresholds, easing confirm
     dwell, price-confirm lookback, refi lag, bull-bypass on/off. Alpha must be a
     PLATEAU (robust) not a SPIKE (overfit to one config).
  B. Leave-one-year-out (modern): which years drive the modern alpha — is it
     distributed or only 2020/2022?
All causal (US T-1, refi +5d). 1B VND, real BQ prices.
Output: data/validate_macro_report.md
"""
import sys, io, os
import numpy as np, pandas as pd
sys.stdout = io.TextIOWrapper(sys.stdout.buffer, encoding="utf-8", errors="replace")
WORKDIR = r"/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude"
os.chdir(WORKDIR); sys.path.insert(0, WORKDIR)
DATADIR = os.path.join(WORKDIR, "data"); os.makedirs(DATADIR, exist_ok=True)
from simulate_holistic_nav import bq
from sbv_macro_overlay import SBV_REFI_EVENTS

STATE_ALLOC = {1: 0.0, 2: 0.2, 3: 0.7, 4: 1.0, 5: 1.3}
TC, TAX, BORROW, INIT, RF = 0.001, 0.001, 0.10, 1_000_000_000, 0.001
NEUTRAL, CRISIS, BEAR = 3, 1, 2
VGB_1Y = {2000:.075,2001:.07,2002:.075,2003:.08,2004:.085,2005:.085,2006:.08,2007:.085,
          2008:.14,2009:.09,2010:.11,2011:.12,2012:.095,2013:.07,2014:.055,2015:.05,
          2016:.05,2017:.045,2018:.04,2019:.036,2020:.025,2021:.012,2022:.035,2023:.025,
          2024:.02,2025:.025,2026:.027}

# default macro params
BASE_P = dict(vix_mult=1.0, spx_mult=1.0, sbv_mult=1.0, refi_lag=5,
              ez_confirm=10, ez_price_lb=10, bull_bypass=True)

print("[1] data...")
px = bq("""SELECT p.time,p.Close,p.MA200,p.D_RSI,s.state FROM tav2_bq.ticker AS p
JOIN tav2_bq.vnindex_5state_dt_4gate AS s ON s.time=p.time
WHERE p.ticker='VNINDEX' ORDER BY p.time""")
px["time"] = pd.to_datetime(px["time"]); px["state"] = px["state"].astype(int)
px = px.dropna(subset=["Close", "state"]).reset_index(drop=True)
us = pd.read_csv("us_market_history.csv", parse_dates=["time"]).sort_values("time")
key = px[["time"]].copy(); key["jt"] = key["time"] - pd.Timedelta(days=1)
um = pd.merge_asof(key.sort_values("jt"), us.rename(columns={"time": "us_time"}),
                   left_on="jt", right_on="us_time", direction="backward").sort_values("time").reset_index(drop=True)
px = px.merge(um[["time", "vix", "spx_dd_1y", "vix_ma252"]], on="time", how="left")
ev = pd.DataFrame(SBV_REFI_EVENTS, columns=["time", "refi"]); ev["time"] = pd.to_datetime(ev["time"])
dr = pd.DataFrame({"time": pd.date_range(px["time"].min(), px["time"].max(), freq="D")}).merge(ev, on="time", how="left")
dr["refi"] = dr["refi"].ffill().bfill()
px = px.merge(dr, on="time", how="left"); px["refi"] = px["refi"].ffill().bfill()
px["refi_raw6m"] = px["refi"] - px["refi"].shift(126)
px["refi_peak6m"] = px["refi"].rolling(126, min_periods=20).max()
px["cut_raw"] = (px["refi_peak6m"] - px["refi"]) >= 0.5
px["vni_r6m"] = px["Close"] / px["Close"].shift(126) - 1
px["bull_flag"] = ((px["vni_r6m"] > 0.15) & (px["Close"] > px["MA200"])).shift(1).fillna(False)
NREC = len(px)


def macro_state(P):
    n = NREC
    vix = px["vix"].values; sdd = px["spx_dd_1y"].values; vixma = px["vix_ma252"].values
    rc6 = px["refi_raw6m"].shift(P["refi_lag"]).values
    cut = px["cut_raw"].shift(P["refi_lag"]).fillna(False).values.astype(bool)
    bull = px["bull_flag"].values.astype(bool); close = px["Close"].values
    vc, vb, vm = 35 * P["vix_mult"], 25 * P["vix_mult"], 20 * P["vix_mult"]
    sc, sb, sm_ = -0.25 * P["spx_mult"], -0.15 * P["spx_mult"], -0.10 * P["spx_mult"]
    de, ds, dm = 3.0 * P["sbv_mult"], 1.5 * P["sbv_mult"], 0.5 * P["sbv_mult"]
    cap = np.full(n, 9); easing = np.zeros(n, bool)
    for t in range(n):
        v, dd, vma, rr = vix[t], sdd[t], vixma[t], rc6[t]
        if P["bull_bypass"] and bull[t]:
            uc = ub = um_ = False
        else:
            uc = (not np.isnan(dd) and dd < sc) or (not np.isnan(v) and v > vc)
            ub = (not np.isnan(dd) and dd < sb) and (not np.isnan(v) and v > vb)
            um_ = (not np.isnan(dd) and dd < sm_) and (not np.isnan(v) and v > vm)
        de_ = (not np.isnan(rr) and rr >= de); ds_ = (not np.isnan(rr) and rr >= ds); dm_ = (not np.isnan(rr) and rr >= dm)
        if uc or de_: cap[t] = CRISIS
        elif ub or ds_: cap[t] = BEAR
        elif um_ or dm_: cap[t] = NEUTRAL
        calm = (not np.isnan(v) and not np.isnan(vma) and v < vma) and (not np.isnan(dd) and dd > -0.05)
        if cap[t] == 9 and cut[t] and calm: easing[t] = True
    persist = np.zeros(n, int)
    for t in range(n):
        persist[t] = persist[t-1] + 1 if (t > 0 and easing[t]) else (1 if easing[t] else 0)
    pup = np.zeros(n, bool); lb = P["ez_price_lb"]; pup[lb:] = close[lb:] > close[:-lb]
    ez = easing & (persist >= P["ez_confirm"]) & pup
    st = px["state"].values.astype(int)
    sm = np.where(cap != 9, np.minimum(st, cap), st)
    sm = np.where((cap == 9) & ez & (sm < NEUTRAL), NEUTRAL, sm).astype(int)
    return sm


def build_w(state):
    n = NREC; close = px["Close"].values; ma200 = px["MA200"].values; rsi = px["D_RSI"].values
    w = np.array([STATE_ALLOC[s] for s in state], float)
    up_raw = (close > ma200) & (~np.isnan(ma200)) & (np.nan_to_num(rsi, nan=0.0) <= 0.72)
    up = np.zeros(n, bool); cf = False; ru = rd = 0
    for t in range(n):
        if up_raw[t]: ru += 1; rd = 0
        else: rd += 1; ru = 0
        if not cf and ru >= 10: cf = True
        elif cf and rd >= 10: cf = False
        up[t] = cf
    w[(state == NEUTRAL) & up] = 0.90
    return w


def sim(state, mask=None):
    n = NREC; close = px["Close"].values
    r = np.zeros(n); r[1:] = close[1:] / close[:-1] - 1
    tgt = build_w(state); tgt_lag = np.concatenate([[0.0], tgt[:-1]])
    yr = px["time"].dt.year.values; dep = np.array([VGB_1Y.get(int(y), 0.001) for y in yr])
    yrs = (px["time"].iloc[-1] - px["time"].iloc[0]).days / 365.25; spy = n / yrs
    nav = np.empty(n); nav[0] = INIT; dret = np.zeros(n)
    for t in range(n):
        w = tgt_lag[t]; wp = tgt_lag[t-1] if t > 0 else 0.0
        cf = max(0.0, 1 - w); lf = max(0.0, w - 1); buy = max(0.0, w - wp); sell = max(0.0, wp - w)
        dret[t] = w * r[t] + cf * dep[t] / spy - lf * BORROW / spy - (buy + sell) * TC - sell * TAX
        if t > 0: nav[t] = nav[t-1] * (1 + dret[t])
    out = pd.DataFrame({"time": px["time"], "nav": nav, "ret": dret})
    return out, spy


def met(out, spy, a=None, b=None):
    o = out
    if a is not None:
        o = out[(out["time"] >= a) & (out["time"] <= b)].reset_index(drop=True)
        if len(o) < 20: return None
        nv = INIT * o["nav"].values / o["nav"].values[0]
    else:
        nv = o["nav"].values
    time = pd.DatetimeIndex(o["time"]); yrs = (time[-1] - time[0]).days / 365.25
    cagr = (nv[-1] / nv[0]) ** (1 / yrs) - 1; ex = o["ret"].values - RF / spy
    sh = ex.mean() / ex.std() * np.sqrt(spy) if ex.std() > 0 else 0
    dd = ((nv - np.maximum.accumulate(nv)) / np.maximum.accumulate(nv)).min()
    return dict(cagr=cagr * 100, sharpe=sh, dd=dd * 100)


# baseline (DT4 state, no macro)
base_state = px["state"].values.astype(int)
ob, spy = sim(base_state)
MOD = (pd.Timestamp("2014-01-01"), px["time"].max())
mb_full = met(ob, spy); mb_mod = met(ob, spy, *MOD)
print(f"[2] Baseline (no macro): Full {mb_full['cagr']:+.2f}% Sh{mb_full['sharpe']:.2f}  Modern {mb_mod['cagr']:+.2f}%")

# ── A. sensitivity grid (one-at-a-time) ──
print("[3] Parameter sensitivity (Δ vs baseline, Full & Modern CAGR)...")
def run_params(P):
    sm = macro_state(P); o, _ = sim(sm)
    return met(o, spy), met(o, spy, *MOD)
grid = {
    "vix_mult": [0.85, 1.0, 1.15], "spx_mult": [0.85, 1.0, 1.15],
    "sbv_mult": [0.7, 1.0, 1.3], "refi_lag": [5, 21, 63],
    "ez_confirm": [5, 10, 15, 20], "ez_price_lb": [5, 10, 20],
    "bull_bypass": [True, False],
}
L = ["# Macro Overlay — Robustness Validation\n",
     f"*Pure-index, real BQ, 1B. Baseline (no macro): Full {mb_full['cagr']:+.2f}%/Sh {mb_full['sharpe']:.2f}/DD {mb_full['dd']:.1f}%, "
     f"Modern {mb_mod['cagr']:+.2f}%/DD {mb_mod['dd']:.1f}%.*\n",
     "## A. One-at-a-time parameter sensitivity (Δ vs baseline)\n",
     "| Param | Value | ΔFull CAGR | ΔModern CAGR | Full Sh | Full DD |", "|---|---|---|---|---|---|"]
rows_sens = []
for pname, vals in grid.items():
    for v in vals:
        P = dict(BASE_P); P[pname] = v
        mf, mm = run_params(P)
        df = mf["cagr"] - mb_full["cagr"]; dm = mm["cagr"] - mb_mod["cagr"]
        star = " ←base" if v == BASE_P[pname] else ""
        L.append(f"| {pname} | {v}{star} | {df:+.2f}pp | {dm:+.2f}pp | {mf['sharpe']:.2f} | {mf['dd']:.1f}% |")
        rows_sens.append((pname, v, df, dm))
        print(f"  {pname:<12}={str(v):<6} ΔFull {df:+.2f}pp  ΔMod {dm:+.2f}pp")

dfs = [r[2] for r in rows_sens]; dms = [r[3] for r in rows_sens]
L.append(f"\n*ΔFull range [{min(dfs):+.2f}, {max(dfs):+.2f}]pp, all {'POSITIVE' if min(dfs)>0 else 'mixed'}; "
         f"ΔModern range [{min(dms):+.2f}, {max(dms):+.2f}]pp. "
         f"Plateau (not spike) ⇒ {'ROBUST' if min(dfs)>-0.2 else 'sensitive'}.*\n")

# ── B. leave-one-year-out (modern) ──
print("[4] Leave-one-year-out (modern alpha attribution)...")
sm_base = macro_state(BASE_P); om, _ = sim(sm_base)
full_alpha_mod = met(om, spy, *MOD)["cagr"] - mb_mod["cagr"]
L.append("## B. Leave-one-year-out — modern alpha attribution\n")
L.append(f"Macro modern alpha (all years) = **{full_alpha_mod:+.2f}pp**. Drop each year, recompute "
         "modern-window alpha; a big drop = that year drives the alpha.\n")
L.append("| Excluded year | Modern alpha w/o it | Δ vs all-years |", )
L.append("|---|---|---|")
om["year"] = om["time"].dt.year; ob["year"] = ob["time"].dt.year
loo = []
for yr in range(2014, 2027):
    mask = om["year"] != yr
    oo = om[mask].reset_index(drop=True); bb = ob[ob["year"] != yr].reset_index(drop=True)
    if len(oo) < 100: continue
    # recompute alpha on remaining modern days
    def cagr_of(o):
        nv = INIT * o["nav"].values / o["nav"].values[0]
        t = pd.DatetimeIndex(o["time"]); y = (t[-1] - t[0]).days / 365.25
        return ((nv[-1] / nv[0]) ** (1 / y) - 1) * 100
    om_mod = om[(om["time"] >= MOD[0]) & (om["year"] != yr)].reset_index(drop=True)
    ob_mod = ob[(ob["time"] >= MOD[0]) & (ob["year"] != yr)].reset_index(drop=True)
    a = cagr_of(om_mod) - cagr_of(ob_mod)
    loo.append((yr, a)); L.append(f"| {yr} | {a:+.2f}pp | {a-full_alpha_mod:+.2f}pp |")
    print(f"  drop {yr}: modern alpha {a:+.2f}pp ({a-full_alpha_mod:+.2f}pp)")
worst = min(loo, key=lambda x: x[1])
L.append(f"\n*Most alpha-carrying year: dropping **{worst[0]}** leaves {worst[1]:+.2f}pp "
         f"(vs {full_alpha_mod:+.2f}pp all-years). If alpha stays positive after dropping the biggest "
         f"contributor, it is NOT a single-event artifact.*\n")
with open(os.path.join(DATADIR, "validate_macro_report.md"), "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    f.write("\n".join(L))
print(f"\n  Full ΔCAGR range [{min(dfs):+.2f},{max(dfs):+.2f}]pp; LOO worst-drop alpha {worst[1]:+.2f}pp (drop {worst[0]})")
print("  Report: data/validate_macro_report.md")
print("DONE.")

    cut = px["cut_raw"].shift(P["refi_lag"]).fillna(False).values.astype(bool)
    bull = px["bull_flag"].values.astype(bool); close = px["Close"].values
    vc, vb, vm = 35 * P["vix_mult"], 25 * P["vix_mult"], 20 * P["vix_mult"]
    sc, sb, sm_ = -0.25 * P["spx_mult"], -0.15 * P["spx_mult"], -0.10 * P["spx_mult"]
    de, ds, dm = 3.0 * P["sbv_mult"], 1.5 * P["sbv_mult"], 0.5 * P["sbv_mult"]
    cap = np.full(n, 9); easing = np.zeros(n, bool)
    for t in range(n):
        v, dd, vma, rr = vix[t], sdd[t], vixma[t], rc6[t]
        if P["bull_bypass"] and bull[t]:
            uc = ub = um_ = False
        else:
            uc = (not np.isnan(dd) and dd < sc) or (not np.isnan(v) and v > vc)
            ub = (not np.isnan(dd) and dd < sb) and (not np.isnan(v) and v > vb)
            um_ = (not np.isnan(dd) and dd < sm_) and (not np.isnan(v) and v > vm)
        de_ = (not np.isnan(rr) and rr >= de); ds_ = (not np.isnan(rr) and rr >= ds); dm_ = (not np.isnan(rr) and rr >= dm)
        if uc or de_: cap[t] = CRISIS
        elif ub or ds_: cap[t] = BEAR
        elif um_ or dm_: cap[t] = NEUTRAL
        calm = (not np.isnan(v) and not np.isnan(vma) and v < vma) and (not np.isnan(dd) and dd > -0.05)
        if cap[t] == 9 and cut[t] and calm: easing[t] = True
    persist = np.zeros(n, int)
    for t in range(n):
        persist[t] = persist[t-1] + 1 if (t > 0 and easing[t]) else (1 if easing[t] else 0)
    pup = np.zeros(n, bool); lb = P["ez_price_lb"]; pup[lb:] = close[lb:] > close[:-lb]
    ez = easing & (persist >= P["ez_confirm"]) & pup
    st = px["state"].values.astype(int)
    sm = np.where(cap != 9, np.minimum(st, cap), st)
    sm = np.where((cap == 9) & ez & (sm < NEUTRAL), NEUTRAL, sm).astype(int)
    return sm


def build_w(state):
    n = NREC; close = px["Close"].values; ma200 = px["MA200"].values; rsi = px["D_RSI"].values
    w = np.array([STATE_ALLOC[s] for s in state], float)
    up_raw = (close > ma200) & (~np.isnan(ma200)) & (np.nan_to_num(rsi, nan=0.0) <= 0.72)
    up = np.zeros(n, bool); cf = False; ru = rd = 0
    for t in range(n):
        if up_raw[t]: ru += 1; rd = 0
        else: rd += 1; ru = 0
        if not cf and ru >= 10: cf = True
        elif cf and rd >= 10: cf = False
        up[t] = cf
    w[(state == NEUTRAL) & up] = 0.90
    return w


def sim(state, mask=None):
    n = NREC; close = px["Close"].values
    r = np.zeros(n); r[1:] = close[1:] / close[:-1] - 1
    tgt = build_w(state); tgt_lag = np.concatenate([[0.0], tgt[:-1]])
    yr = px["time"].dt.year.values; dep = np.array([VGB_1Y.get(int(y), 0.001) for y in yr])
    yrs = (px["time"].iloc[-1] - px["time"].iloc[0]).days / 365.25; spy = n / yrs
    nav = np.empty(n); nav[0] = INIT; dret = np.zeros(n)
    for t in range(n):
        w = tgt_lag[t]; wp = tgt_lag[t-1] if t > 0 else 0.0
        cf = max(0.0, 1 - w); lf = max(0.0, w - 1); buy = max(0.0, w - wp); sell = max(0.0, wp - w)
        dret[t] = w * r[t] + cf * dep[t] / spy - lf * BORROW / spy - (buy + sell) * TC - sell * TAX
        if t > 0: nav[t] = nav[t-1] * (1 + dret[t])
    out = pd.DataFrame({"time": px["time"], "nav": nav, "ret": dret})
    return out, spy


def met(out, spy, a=None, b=None):
    o = out
    if a is not None:
        o = out[(out["time"] >= a) & (out["time"] <= b)].reset_index(drop=True)
        if len(o) < 20: return None
        nv = INIT * o["nav"].values / o["nav"].values[0]
    else:
        nv = o["nav"].values
    time = pd.DatetimeIndex(o["time"]); yrs = (time[-1] - time[0]).days / 365.25
    cagr = (nv[-1] / nv[0]) ** (1 / yrs) - 1; ex = o["ret"].values - RF / spy
    sh = ex.mean() / ex.std() * np.sqrt(spy) if ex.std() > 0 else 0
    dd = ((nv - np.maximum.accumulate(nv)) / np.maximum.accumulate(nv)).min()
    return dict(cagr=cagr * 100, sharpe=sh, dd=dd * 100)


# baseline (DT4 state, no macro)
base_state = px["state"].values.astype(int)
ob, spy = sim(base_state)
MOD = (pd.Timestamp("2014-01-01"), px["time"].max())
mb_full = met(ob, spy); mb_mod = met(ob, spy, *MOD)
print(f"[2] Baseline (no macro): Full {mb_full['cagr']:+.2f}% Sh{mb_full['sharpe']:.2f}  Modern {mb_mod['cagr']:+.2f}%")

# ── A. sensitivity grid (one-at-a-time) ──
print("[3] Parameter sensitivity (Δ vs baseline, Full & Modern CAGR)...")
def run_params(P):
    sm = macro_state(P); o, _ = sim(sm)
    return met(o, spy), met(o, spy, *MOD)
grid = {
    "vix_mult": [0.85, 1.0, 1.15], "spx_mult": [0.85, 1.0, 1.15],
    "sbv_mult": [0.7, 1.0, 1.3], "refi_lag": [5, 21, 63],
    "ez_confirm": [5, 10, 15, 20], "ez_price_lb": [5, 10, 20],
    "bull_bypass": [True, False],
}
L = ["# Macro Overlay — Robustness Validation\n",
     f"*Pure-index, real BQ, 1B. Baseline (no macro): Full {mb_full['cagr']:+.2f}%/Sh {mb_full['sharpe']:.2f}/DD {mb_full['dd']:.1f}%, "
     f"Modern {mb_mod['cagr']:+.2f}%/DD {mb_mod['dd']:.1f}%.*\n",
     "## A. One-at-a-time parameter sensitivity (Δ vs baseline)\n",
     "| Param | Value | ΔFull CAGR | ΔModern CAGR | Full Sh | Full DD |", "|---|---|---|---|---|---|"]
rows_sens = []
for pname, vals in grid.items():
    for v in vals:
        P = dict(BASE_P); P[pname] = v
        mf, mm = run_params(P)
        df = mf["cagr"] - mb_full["cagr"]; dm = mm["cagr"] - mb_mod["cagr"]
        star = " ←base" if v == BASE_P[pname] else ""
        L.append(f"| {pname} | {v}{star} | {df:+.2f}pp | {dm:+.2f}pp | {mf['sharpe']:.2f} | {mf['dd']:.1f}% |")
        rows_sens.append((pname, v, df, dm))
        print(f"  {pname:<12}={str(v):<6} ΔFull {df:+.2f}pp  ΔMod {dm:+.2f}pp")

dfs = [r[2] for r in rows_sens]; dms = [r[3] for r in rows_sens]
L.append(f"\n*ΔFull range [{min(dfs):+.2f}, {max(dfs):+.2f}]pp, all {'POSITIVE' if min(dfs)>0 else 'mixed'}; "
         f"ΔModern range [{min(dms):+.2f}, {max(dms):+.2f}]pp. "
         f"Plateau (not spike) ⇒ {'ROBUST' if min(dfs)>-0.2 else 'sensitive'}.*\n")

# ── B. leave-one-year-out (modern) ──
print("[4] Leave-one-year-out (modern alpha attribution)...")
sm_base = macro_state(BASE_P); om, _ = sim(sm_base)
full_alpha_mod = met(om, spy, *MOD)["cagr"] - mb_mod["cagr"]
L.append("## B. Leave-one-year-out — modern alpha attribution\n")
L.append(f"Macro modern alpha (all years) = **{full_alpha_mod:+.2f}pp**. Drop each year, recompute "
         "modern-window alpha; a big drop = that year drives the alpha.\n")
L.append("| Excluded year | Modern alpha w/o it | Δ vs all-years |", )
L.append("|---|---|---|")
om["year"] = om["time"].dt.year; ob["year"] = ob["time"].dt.year
loo = []
for yr in range(2014, 2027):
    mask = om["year"] != yr
    oo = om[mask].reset_index(drop=True); bb = ob[ob["year"] != yr].reset_index(drop=True)
    if len(oo) < 100: continue
    # recompute alpha on remaining modern days
    def cagr_of(o):
        nv = INIT * o["nav"].values / o["nav"].values[0]
        t = pd.DatetimeIndex(o["time"]); y = (t[-1] - t[0]).days / 365.25
        return ((nv[-1] / nv[0]) ** (1 / y) - 1) * 100
    om_mod = om[(om["time"] >= MOD[0]) & (om["year"] != yr)].reset_index(drop=True)
    ob_mod = ob[(ob["time"] >= MOD[0]) & (ob["year"] != yr)].reset_index(drop=True)
    a = cagr_of(om_mod) - cagr_of(ob_mod)
    loo.append((yr, a)); L.append(f"| {yr} | {a:+.2f}pp | {a-full_alpha_mod:+.2f}pp |")
    print(f"  drop {yr}: modern alpha {a:+.2f}pp ({a-full_alpha_mod:+.2f}pp)")
worst = min(loo, key=lambda x: x[1])
L.append(f"\n*Most alpha-carrying year: dropping **{worst[0]}** leaves {worst[1]:+.2f}pp "
         f"(vs {full_alpha_mod:+.2f}pp all-years). If alpha stays positive after dropping the biggest "
         f"contributor, it is NOT a single-event artifact.*\n")
with open(os.path.join(DATADIR, "validate_macro_report.md"), "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    f.write("\n".join(L))
print(f"\n  Full ΔCAGR range [{min(dfs):+.2f},{max(dfs):+.2f}]pp; LOO worst-drop alpha {worst[1]:+.2f}pp (drop {worst[0]})")
print("  Report: data/validate_macro_report.md")
print("DONE.")

content.text:
Important and honest finding from the validation:

**A. Parameter sensitivity = ROBUST plateau.** With the (essential) bull-bypass on, **every** parameter variation gives positive full-period alpha [+0.39, +0.76]pp — a plateau, not a spike. The one config that breaks it is `bull_bypass=False` (−0.67pp) — which *confirms* the bull-bypass is a structural necessity (matches your documented "US-override-wrong-in-bull"), not a tuned knob. `sbv_mult` barely matters, lags 5–21 fine. Good anti-overfit evidence for the signal design.

**B. But the pure-index modern LOO reveals something:** modern pure-index alpha is only **+0.05pp** (negligible) — dropping any year 2015-26 changes nothing. So the macro layer's *modern* value is **NOT** in index-allocation; it appears only under **leverage/stock-book interaction** (the +0.88pp we saw in V5). That's consistent with your research theme ("the eval metric determines the winner"). 

→ So the modern alpha must be attributed on the **integrated** side, not pure-index. Let me attribute the integrated alpha per-year from the saved NAV (free), then run the cost-stress.

import pandas as pd, numpy as np
d=pd.read_csv('data/v5_macro_integrated_nav.csv',index_col=0,parse_dates=True)
print('cols',list(d.columns))
def yrly(a,b):
    out=[]
    for yr in range(2014,2027):
        ga=d[a][d.index.year==yr]; gb=d[b][d.index.year==yr]
        if len(ga)<5: continue
        ra=ga.iloc[-1]/ga.iloc[0]-1; rb=gb.iloc[-1]/gb.iloc[0]-1
        out.append((yr,ra*100,rb*100,(ra-rb)*100))
    return out
print('\nKELLY: year | DT4 | DT4+MACRO | delta(pp)')
tot=0
for yr,r0,rm,dl in yrly('V5_DT4_KELLY','V5_DT4MACRO_KELLY'):
    print(f'  {yr}  {r0:+6.1f}%  {rm:+6.1f}%  {dl:+5.1f}pp'); tot+=dl
print(f'  sum-of-yearly-delta {tot:+.1f}pp')
print('\nBASE: year | DT4 | DT4+MACRO | delta(pp)')
for yr,r0,rm,dl in yrly('V1_DT4_BASE','V1_DT4MACRO_BASE'):
    print(f'  {yr}  {r0:+6.1f}%  {rm:+6.1f}%  {dl:+5.1f}pp')
"

content.text:
Good — the per-year attribution shows the integrated macro alpha is **distributed, not a single-event fluke** (reading macro−nomacro): positive in **2014 (+4.1), 2018 (+2.1), 2020 (+1.2), 2021 (+7.3), 2022 (+3.6), 2023 (+2.0)**; with real costs in **2015 (−5.2, the China-devaluation US scare capped a VN recovery)** and 2019/2024/2025 (small). So it's net-positive across *six* years, not one — but with genuine year-level dispersion (2021's +7.3pp is leverage-amplified bull capture, somewhat fortunate). Moderate confidence confirmed.

Now the **cost stress** — does the leverage alpha survive realistic costs? Let me parameterize the integrated test for higher TC.

content.text:
**Cost-stress result (TC 0.3%, 3× base):** alpha shrinks ~half but **survives positive** — KELLY DT4 +17.88%→+18.20% (**+0.32pp**, OOS +1.08pp), BASE +17.84%→+18.21% (**+0.37pp**, OOS +0.97pp). BASE keeps better DD/Calmar.

## Bước (1) — Kết luận validation
| Kiểm tra | Kết quả |
|---|---|
| **Parameter sensitivity** | ✅ Plateau: mọi biến thể +0.39→+0.76pp (pure-index). Bull-bypass tắt mới hỏng → là *cấu trúc bắt buộc*, không phải knob tuned |
| **Per-year attribution** | ✅ Phân tán 6 năm (2014/18/20/21/22/23 dương), không phải 1 sự kiện; có dispersion thật (2015 −5.2, 2021 +7.3) |
| **Cost stress TC 0.3%** | ✅ Sống sót: KELLY +0.32pp / BASE +0.37pp (OOS ~+1pp); BASE giữ DD/Calmar tốt hơn |

**Verdict: đủ robust để sang paper-trade.** Caveat trung thực: edge modern khiêm tốn (~+0.3–0.4pp ròng chi phí), thiên về các năm macro-stress/recovery. **BASE là cấu hình khuyến nghị.** [data/validate_macro_report.md](data/validate_macro_report.md)

Validation ổn → sang **bước (2)**. Tôi đọc khung paper-trade hiện có để deploy đúng pattern.

1	# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
2	"""V12 'AM DUONG' + DT 4-gate 5-state — transparent sim (SHADOW A/B vs pt_v12_dt4)
3	   paper-trade window, 50B NAV.
4	
5	5-state source: DT 4-gate computed causally from `tav2_bq.vnindex_5state_tam_quan_v34b_clean`.
6	  4-gate params: default=10, enter_crisis=25, exit_crisis=10, enter_exbull=25, exit_exbull=10.
7	  Behaviorally identical to DT_10_25_25 (0% diff). Computed on-the-fly from the
8	  live TQ34b clean table so it [REDACTED] stays in sync with daily refresh.
9	
10	  This is the DT shadow arm. The running pt_v12_dt4.py uses raw TQ34b. Comparing
11	  the two over the paper-trade window tests live whether DT 4-gate's backtested
12	  +1.06pp Full CAGR (V12, BAL+LAGGED) holds out of sample. Decision: end June 2026.
13	
14	Architecture (per ba_v12_am_duong_spec.md):
15	  - 25B BAL leg: BA v11 stack (SV_TIGHT + P3 + RE_BACKLOG + V6 ETF parking)
16	  - 25B LAGGED leg: HL_3y earnings-drift book
17	
18	Outputs (analyze_portfolio.py compatible):
19	  data/pt_v12_dt4_logs.csv          - daily NAV + cash + n_pos + n_tx
20	  data/pt_v12_dt4_transactions.csv  - every buy/sell + ETF rebalance + MTM phantoms
21	  data/pt_v12_dt4_open_positions.csv - unrealized P&L snapshot at end
22	  data/pt_v12_dt4_report.md         - analyze_portfolio.py output + reconciliation
23	"""
24	import os, sys, io, pickle, bisect
25	from datetime import datetime
26	import numpy as np
27	import pandas as pd
28	
29	sys.stdout = io.TextIOWrapper(sys.stdout.buffer, encoding="utf-8", errors="replace")
30	WORKDIR = r"/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude"
31	sys.path.insert(0, WORKDIR)
32	os.chdir(WORKDIR)
33	
34	from simulate_holistic_nav import simulate, bq, VNI_QUERY
35	from signal_v11_sql import SIGNAL_V11
36	from pt_dates import START_DATE, detect_end_date
37	
38	END_DATE = detect_end_date()
39	TOTAL_NAV  = 50e9
40	BAL_NAV    = 25e9
41	LAG_NAV    = 25e9
42	POSITION_VND = 1.25e9
43	FILL_CAP = 0.20
44	T1_TOP_ADV = 50e9
45	
46	INTRADAY_PKL = os.path.join(WORKDIR, "intraday_full.pkl")
47	
48	BUY_TIERS_V11 = {"MEGA","MOMENTUM","MOMENTUM_N","MOMENTUM_S","MOMENTUM_QUALITY",
49	                  "MOMENTUM_A","MOMENTUM_S_N","COMPOUNDER_BUY","DEEP_VALUE_RECOVERY","S_PRO",
50	                  "RE_BACKLOG_BUY"}
51	TIER_BAL = ["MEGA","MOMENTUM","MOMENTUM_N","MOMENTUM_S","DEEP_VALUE_RECOVERY","RE_BACKLOG_BUY"]
52	SECTOR_CAP_EXEMPT = {"RE_BACKLOG_BUY"}
53	MAX_POS_V11 = 12
54	TIER_WEIGHTS_V11 = {t: 0.10 for t in TIER_BAL}
55	
56	print("="*100)
57	print(f"  V12 'AM DUONG' + DT 4-gate (SHADOW) — TRANSPARENT SIM   period={START_DATE} -> {END_DATE}   NAV={TOTAL_NAV/1e9:.0f}B")
58	print(f"  Architecture: 25B BAL (BA v11 + V6 ETF) + 25B LAGGED (HL_3y)")
59	print("="*100)
60	
61	# [BINARY_STRIPPED]
62	# 1. Intraday cache for v4 HYBRID BUY fill
63	# [BINARY_STRIPPED]
64	print("\n[1] Building v4 HYBRID alt-fill prices...")
65	with open(INTRADAY_PKL,"rb") as f: intraday = pickle.load(f)
66	adv_by_ticker = {}
67	slot_price_atc, slot_vol_atc, slot_price_t1115, slot_vol_t1115 = {},{},{},{}
68	for tk, bars in intraday.items():
69	    if bars is None or bars.empty: continue
70	    b = bars.copy()
71	    b["time"] = pd.to_datetime(b["time"]); b["date_ts"] = b["time"].dt.normalize()
72	    b["hm"] = b["time"].dt.strftime("%H:%M"); b["close_vnd"] = b["close"].astype(float)*1000.0
73	    b["vnd_traded"] = b["close_vnd"]*b["volume"].astype(float)
74	    sess = b.groupby("date_ts", sort=False)["vnd_traded"].sum()
75	    adv_by_ticker[tk] = float(sess.mean())
76	    for label, hm, pd_, vd_ in [("atc","14:45",slot_price_atc,slot_vol_atc),
77	                                  ("t1115","11:15",slot_price_t1115,slot_vol_t1115)]:
78	        sub = b[b["hm"]==hm]
79	        for _, row in sub.iterrows():
80	            d_ts = row["date_ts"]
81	            pd_.setdefault(tk,{})[d_ts] = float(row["close_vnd"])
82	            vd_.setdefault(tk,{})[d_ts] = float(row["vnd_traded"])
83	alt_hybrid = {}
84	for tk in set(slot_price_atc.keys()) | set(slot_price_t1115.keys()):
85	    adv = adv_by_ticker.get(tk,0)
86	    is_top = adv >= T1_TOP_ADV
87	    src_p = slot_price_atc.get(tk,{}) if is_top else slot_price_t1115.get(tk,{})
88	    src_v = slot_vol_atc.get(tk,{}) if is_top else slot_vol_t1115.get(tk,{})
89	    for d_ts, p in src_p.items():
90	        v = src_v.get(d_ts)
91	        if v is not None and v*FILL_CAP >= POSITION_VND:
92	            alt_hybrid.setdefault(tk,{})[d_ts] = p
93	
94	# [BINARY_STRIPPED]
95	# 2. Load BA v11 signals + filters
96	# [BINARY_STRIPPED]
97	print("\n[2] Loading v11 signals + Release_Date + 5-state + overheat + D1 override...")
98	sig = bq(SIGNAL_V11.format(start=START_DATE, end=END_DATE))
99	sig["time"] = pd.to_datetime(sig["time"])
100	print(f"  signals: {len(sig):,} rows")
101	
102	rel = bq(f"""SELECT tf.ticker, tf.Release_Date FROM tav2_bq.ticker_financial AS tf
103	WHERE tf.Release_Date BETWEEN DATE '{START_DATE}' AND DATE '{END_DATE}'""")
104	rel["Release_Date"] = pd.to_datetime(rel["Release_Date"])
105	rel_by_tk = rel.sort_values(["ticker","Release_Date"]).groupby("ticker")["Release_Date"].apply(list).to_dict()
106	ds_arr = np.empty(len(sig))
107	for i,(tk,t) in enumerate(zip(sig["ticker"].values, sig["time"].values)):
108	    arr = rel_by_tk.get(tk)
109	    if not arr: ds_arr[i]=np.nan; continue
110	    idx = bisect.bisect_right(arr, pd.Timestamp(t))
111	    ds_arr[i] = np.nan if idx==0 else (pd.Timestamp(t)-arr[idx-1]).days
112	sig["days_since_release"] = ds_arr
113	
114	# ── DT 4-gate (= DT_10_25_25 canonical) computed causally from TQ34b ──
115	# 4 independent confirmation gates. Pull FULL 2014+ TQ34b history for proper
116	# warmup, apply the causal commitment filter, then slice to the paper window.
117	def _dt_4gate(states_arr, default=10, enC=25, exC=10, enX=25, exX=10):
118	    out = states_arr.copy(); committed = states_arr[0]; ps, pr = states_arr[0], 1
119	    for t in range(1, len(states_arr)):
120	        s = states_arr[t]
121	        if s == ps: pr += 1
122	        else: ps, pr = s, 1
123	        if ps == committed:
124	            out[t] = committed; continue
125	        need = (enC if ps == 1 else enX if ps == 5
126	                else exC if committed == 1 else exX if committed == 5 else default)
127	        if pr >= need: committed = ps
128	        out[t] = committed
129	    return out
130	
131	state_full = bq(f"""SELECT s.time, s.state FROM tav2_bq.vnindex_5state_tam_quan_v34b_clean AS s
132	WHERE s.time BETWEEN DATE '2014-01-01' AND DATE '{END_DATE}' ORDER BY s.time""")
133	state_full["time"] = pd.to_datetime(state_full["time"])
134	state_full = state_full.sort_values("time").reset_index(drop=True)
135	state_full["state_dt"] = _dt_4gate(state_full["state"].values.astype(int))
136	state_df = (state_full[state_full["time"] >= pd.Timestamp(START_DATE)]
137	            [["time", "state_dt"]].rename(columns={"state_dt": "state"}).reset_index(drop=True))
138	state_by_date = dict(zip(state_df["time"], state_df["state"]))
139	_tqw = state_full[state_full["time"] >= pd.Timestamp(START_DATE)]["state"].values
140	_dtw = state_full[state_full["time"] >= pd.Timestamp(START_DATE)]["state_dt"].values
141	print(f"  State = DT 4-gate (10/25/10/25/10). Window transitions: "
142	      f"TQ34b={int((_tqw[1:]!=_tqw[:-1]).sum())} DT={int((_dtw[1:]!=_dtw[:-1]).sum())}")
143	
144	vni_full = bq(f"""SELECT t.time, t.Close, t.MA200, t.D_RSI FROM tav2_bq.ticker AS t
145	WHERE t.ticker='VNINDEX' AND t.time BETWEEN DATE '{START_DATE}' AND DATE '{END_DATE}'""")
146	vni_full["time"] = pd.to_datetime(vni_full["time"])
147	vni_full["ratio"] = vni_full["Close"]/vni_full["MA200"]
148	vni_full["state"] = vni_full["time"].map(state_by_date)
149	vni_full["overheat"] = (vni_full["ratio"]>1.30) & ((vni_full["state"]==5)|(vni_full["D_RSI"]>0.75))
150	overheat_dates = set(vni_full[vni_full["overheat"]]["time"])
151	
152	sig["state"] = sig["time"].map(state_by_date)
153	
154	# D1 RE_BACKLOG_BUY override
155	d1 = bq(f"""
156	WITH adv_dated AS (
157	  SELECT f.ticker, f.time AS f_time,
158	    SAFE_DIVIDE(f.AdvCust_P0, NULLIF(f.AdvCust_P4,0))-1 AS adv_yoy,
159	    LEAD(f.time) OVER (PARTITION BY f.ticker ORDER BY f.time) AS next_f_time
160	  FROM tav2_bq.ticker_financial AS f
161	),
162	fa_dated AS (
163	  SELECT f.ticker, f.time AS f_time, f.tier AS fa_tier,
164	    LEAD(f.time) OVER (PARTITION BY f.ticker ORDER BY f.time) AS next_f_time
165	  FROM tav2_bq.fa_ratings AS f
166	),
167	fin_dated AS (
168	  SELECT f.ticker, f.time AS fin_time, f.Revenue_YoY_P0,
169	    LEAD(f.time) OVER (PARTITION BY f.ticker ORDER BY f.time) AS next_fin_time
170	  FROM tav2_bq.ticker_financial AS f
171	)
172	SELECT t.ticker, t.time, fa.fa_tier,
173	  SAFE_DIVIDE(t.NP_P0, t.NP_P4)-1 AS np_yoy,
174	  fin.Revenue_YoY_P0 AS rev_yoy, adv.adv_yoy, s5.state AS state5
175	FROM tav2_bq.ticker AS t
176	LEFT JOIN tav2_bq.vnindex_5state_tam_quan_v34b_clean AS s5 ON s5.time = t.time
177	LEFT JOIN fa_dated AS fa ON fa.ticker=t.ticker AND t.time>=fa.f_time AND (fa.next_f_time IS NULL OR t.time<fa.next_f_time)
178	LEFT JOIN fin_dated AS fin ON fin.ticker=t.ticker AND t.time>=fin.fin_time AND (fin.next_fin_time IS NULL OR t.time<fin.next_fin_time)
179	LEFT JOIN adv_dated AS adv ON adv.ticker=t.ticker AND t.time>=adv.f_time AND (adv.next_f_time IS NULL OR t.time<adv.next_f_time)
180	WHERE t.ICB_Code=8633 AND t.time BETWEEN DATE '{START_DATE}' AND DATE '{END_DATE}'
181	  AND t.ticker IN (SELECT DISTINCT t2.ticker FROM tav2_bq.ticker_prune AS t2)
182	""")
183	d1["time"] = pd.to_datetime(d1["time"])
184	d1_mask = (d1["adv_yoy"].notna() & (d1["adv_yoy"]>0.5) & d1["fa_tier"].isin(["C","D"])
185	           & d1["state5"].isin([3,4,5])
186	           & ((d1["np_yoy"].fillna(-99)>0) | (d1["rev_yoy"].fillna(-99)>0)))
187	d1_q = d1.loc[d1_mask,["ticker","time"]].assign(_d1_ok=True)
188	sig = sig.merge(d1_q, on=["ticker","time"], how="left")
189	omask = sig["_d1_ok"].fillna(False) & (sig["ta"]>=120)
190	sig.loc[omask,"play_type"] = "RE_BACKLOG_BUY"
191	sig = sig.drop(columns=["_d1_ok"])
192	
193	def sv_tight_keep(row):
194	    s = row["state"]; days = row["days_since_release"]
195	    if pd.isna(s): return True
196	    s = int(s)
197	    if s in (4,5): return True
198	    if s == 1: return pd.notna(days) and days<=30
199	    if s in (2,3): return pd.notna(days) and days<=60
200	    return True
201	mb = sig["play_type"].isin(BUY_TIERS_V11)
202	mk = (~mb) | sig.apply(sv_tight_keep, axis=1)
203	sig_f = sig[mk].copy()
204	mp3 = sig_f["time"].isin(overheat_dates) & sig_f["play_type"].isin(BUY_TIERS_V11)
205	sig_f.loc[mp3,"play_type"] = "AVOID_overheated"
206	print(f"  D1 reclassified: {int(omask.sum())}; SV_TIGHT filtered: {int((mb & ~sig.apply(sv_tight_keep,axis=1)).sum())}; P3 blocked: {int(mp3.sum())}")
207	
208	# [BINARY_STRIPPED]
209	# 3. Common data (prices, opens, sec_map, ETF prices, state ff)
210	# [BINARY_STRIPPED]
211	print("\n[3] Loading prices/Open/sector/E1VFVN30...")
212	opens_df = bq(f"""SELECT t.ticker, t.time, t.Open AS open_price FROM tav2_bq.ticker AS t
213	WHERE t.time BETWEEN DATE '{START_DATE}' AND DATE '{END_DATE}'
214	  AND t.ticker IN (SELECT DISTINCT t2.ticker FROM tav2_bq.ticker_prune AS t2)
215	  AND t.Open IS NOT NULL""")
216	opens_df["time"] = pd.to_datetime(opens_df["time"])
217	open_prices = {tk: dict(zip(g["time"], g["open_price"])) for tk,g in opens_df.groupby("ticker")}
218	prices = {tk: dict(zip(g["time"], g["Close"])) for tk,g in sig_f.groupby("ticker")}
219	liq_map = {(r["ticker"],r["time"]): r["liq"] for _,r in sig_f.iterrows()}
220	
221	vni = bq(VNI_QUERY.format(start=START_DATE, end=END_DATE))
222	vni["time"] = pd.to_datetime(vni["time"])
223	vni_dates = sorted(vni["time"].unique())
224	
225	etf_real = bq(f"""SELECT t.time, t.Close FROM tav2_bq.ticker AS t
226	WHERE t.ticker='E1VFVN30' AND t.time BETWEEN DATE '{START_DATE}' AND DATE '{END_DATE}' ORDER BY t.time""")
227	etf_real["time"] = pd.to_datetime(etf_real["time"])
228	vn30_underlying = dict(zip(etf_real["time"], etf_real["Close"]))
229	
230	sec_map = bq("""SELECT DISTINCT t.ticker, CAST(FLOOR(t.ICB_Code/1000) AS INT64) AS s
231	FROM tav2_bq.ticker AS t WHERE t.ICB_Code IS NOT NULL
232	  AND t.ticker IN (SELECT DISTINCT t2.ticker FROM tav2_bq.ticker_prune AS t2)""").set_index("ticker")["s"].to_dict()
233	
234	state_ff = {}; last_s=None
235	for d in vni_dates:
236	    s = state_by_date.get(d)
237	    if s is not None: last_s = s
238	    state_ff[d] = last_s
239	
240	LIQ_FULL = {"liquidity_volume_pct":0.20,"max_fill_days":5,
241	            "liquidity_lookup":liq_map,"exit_slippage_tiered":True}
242	
243	# [BINARY_STRIPPED]
244	# 4. Run BAL book @ 25B (with transparent event_log + etf_log)
245	# [BINARY_STRIPPED]
246	print("\n[4] Running BAL book @ 25B...")
247	events_bal = []; etf_bal = []
248	nav_bal, trades_bal = simulate(sig_f, prices, vni_dates,
249	    allowed_tiers=TIER_BAL, max_positions=MAX_POS_V11, hold_days=45, stop_loss=-0.20,
250	    min_hold=2, slippage=0.0, init_nav=BAL_NAV,
251	    sector_limit_per_sector={8:4}, ticker_sector_map=sec_map,
252	    sector_cap_exempt_tiers=SECTOR_CAP_EXEMPT,
253	    tier_weights=TIER_WEIGHTS_V11,
254	    deposit_annual=0.0, borrow_annual=0.10, state_by_date=state_ff,  # deposit=0% / borrow=10% (user 2026-05-23)
255	    cash_etf_states={3:0.7}, vn30_underlying=vn30_underlying,
256	    etf_mgmt_fee_annual=0.0, etf_tracking_drag_annual=0.0,
257	    etf_rebalance_friction=0.0015,
258	    open_prices=open_prices, t1_open_exec=True,
259	    entry_alt_prices=alt_hybrid, entry_fill_mode="v4_hybrid",
260	    event_log=events_bal, etf_log=etf_bal,
261	    force_close_eod=False,
262	    **LIQ_FULL, name="pt_v12_dt4_BAL")
263	nav_bal["time"] = pd.to_datetime(nav_bal["time"])
264	print(f"  BAL events: {len(events_bal)} stock + {len(etf_bal)} ETF; closed_trades={len(trades_bal)}")
265	print(f"  BAL final: {nav_bal.set_index('time')['nav'].iloc[-1]/1e9:.4f}B")
266	
267	# [BINARY_STRIPPED]
268	# 5. Run LAGGED book @ 25B (transparent loop with event emission)
269	# [BINARY_STRIPPED]
270	print("\n[5] Running LAGGED book @ 25B (transparent)...")
271	with open("earnings_px.pkl","rb") as f: px_data = pickle.load(f)
272	px_data["time"] = pd.to_datetime(px_data["time"])
273	px_close = px_data.pivot_table(index="time", columns="ticker", values="Close", aggfunc="first").sort_index().ffill(limit=5)
274	master_idx = pd.DatetimeIndex(px_close.index).as_unit("ns")
275	px_close.index = master_idx
276	all_dates = np.array(master_idx)
277	
278	with open("lagged_pos_ov.pkl","rb") as f: ov = pickle.load(f)
279	ov["time"] = pd.to_datetime(ov["time"])
280	px_open = ov.pivot_table(index="time", columns="ticker", values="Open", aggfunc="first").sort_index().reindex(master_idx).ffill(limit=5)
281	liq_l = ov.pivot_table(index="time", columns="ticker", values="Volume_3M_P50", aggfunc="first").sort_index().reindex(master_idx).ffill(limit=5)
282	
283	ev = pd.read_csv("earnings_events_classified.csv", parse_dates=["Release_Date"])
284	ev = ev.sort_values(["ticker","Release_Date"]).reset_index(drop=True)
285	LN2 = np.log(2); HL = 3.0
286	ev["pa_HL3"] = np.nan; ev["prior_n_good"] = 0
287	for tk, g in ev.groupby("ticker"):
288	    good_history = []
289	    for row_idx in g.index.tolist():
290	        row = ev.loc[row_idx]
291	        cur_date = row["Release_Date"]
292	        n_good = len(good_history)
293	        ev.at[row_idx,"prior_n_good"] = n_good
294	        if n_good >= 1:
295	            dates_arr = pd.to_datetime([d for d,_ in good_history])
296	            posts_arr = np.array([p for _,p in good_history])
297	            age_yrs = (cur_date - dates_arr).days.values / 365.25
298	            w = np.exp(-LN2*age_yrs/HL)
299	            ev.at[row_idx,"pa_HL3"] = (posts_arr*w).sum()/w.sum() if w.sum()>0 else np.nan
300	        if pd.notna(row["NP_R"]) and row["NP_R"]>=15 and pd.notna(row["post_ret"]):
301	            good_history.append((cur_date, row["post_ret"]))
302	
303	POST_MIN, N_MIN, NPR_MIN, ENTRY, HOLD, MAX_POS, POS_PCT = 5.0, 4, 0.15, 5, 25, 12, 0.08
304	e = ev[(ev["NP_R"]>=NPR_MIN*100) & (ev["prior_n_good"]>=N_MIN) & (ev["pa_HL3"]>=POST_MIN)].copy()
305	
306	sw = pd.Timestamp(START_DATE); ew = pd.Timestamp(END_DATE)
307	def offset_date(ref_dt, offset):
308	    ref = np.datetime64(ref_dt)
309	    pos = np.searchsorted(all_dates, ref, side="right")-1
310	    if pos<0: return None
311	    tgt = pos+offset
312	    if tgt>=len(all_dates) or tgt<0: return None
313	    return pd.Timestamp(all_dates[tgt])
314	
315	schedule = []
316	for _, row in e.iterrows():
317	    tk = row["ticker"]; rdt = row["Release_Date"]
318	    if tk not in px_open.columns: continue
319	    entry_dt = offset_date(rdt, ENTRY); exit_dt = offset_date(rdt, ENTRY+HOLD)
320	    if entry_dt is None or exit_dt is None: continue
321	    if entry_dt < sw or entry_dt > ew: continue
322	    schedule.append({"ticker":tk,"entry_dt":entry_dt,"exit_dt":exit_dt,"release_dt":rdt})
323	sched_lag = pd.DataFrame(schedule).sort_values("entry_dt").reset_index(drop=True)
324	print(f"  LAGGED signals in window: {len(sched_lag)}")
325	entries_by_day = sched_lag.groupby("entry_dt")
326	exits_by_day = sched_lag.groupby("exit_dt")
327	
328	sim_days_lag = [d for d in master_idx if sw <= d <= ew]
329	cash_l = LAG_NAV
330	positions_l = {}
331	nav_history_l = []
332	events_lag = []
333	SLIP_IN, SLIP_OUT, TAX = 0.001, 0.0015, 0.001
334	LIQ_CAP=0.20; MAX_FILL=5; LIQ_MIN=2e9
335	hid_seq = 0
336	
337	for dt in sim_days_lag:
338	    # 1. EXITS first
339	    if dt in exits_by_day.groups:
340	        for _, ex_row in exits_by_day.get_group(dt).iterrows():
341	            tk = ex_row["ticker"]
342	            if tk not in positions_l: continue
343	            pos = positions_l[tk]
344	            if pos["exit_dt"] != dt: continue
345	            fpx = px_open.at[dt, tk] if tk in px_open.columns else np.nan
346	            if pd.isna(fpx) or fpx<=0:
347	                fpx = px_close.at[dt, tk] if tk in px_close.columns else np.nan
348	                if pd.isna(fpx) or fpx<=0: continue
349	            gross = pos["shares"]*fpx          # CLEAN gross
350	            slip = gross*SLIP_OUT
351	            tax = (gross-slip)*TAX
352	            fee_total = slip + tax
353	            proceeds = gross - fee_total
354	            cash_l += proceeds
355	            events_lag.append({
356	                "ymd": dt, "ticker": tk, "action": "sell",
357	                "buy_amount": 0.0,
358	                "sell_amount": float(gross),
359	                "fee": float(fee_total),
360	                "adj_price": float(fpx),
361	                "shares": float(pos["shares"]),
362	                "holding_id": pos["holding_id"],
363	                "play_type": "LAGGED_HL3",
364	                "cash_after": float(cash_l),
365	                "reason": "LAGGED_EXIT_T30",
366	                "book": "LAGGED",
367	            })
368	            del positions_l[tk]
369	    # 2. ENTRIES
370	    if dt in entries_by_day.groups:
371	        mtm = sum(p["shares"]*(px_close.at[dt,tk] if tk in px_close.columns and pd.notna(px_close.at[dt,tk]) else p["entry_px"]) for tk,p in positions_l.items())
372	        nav_now = cash_l + mtm
373	        for _, en_row in entries_by_day.get_group(dt).iterrows():
374	            tk = en_row["ticker"]
375	            if tk in positions_l or len(positions_l)>=MAX_POS: continue
376	            fpx = px_open.at[dt, tk] if tk in px_open.columns else np.nan
377	            if pd.isna(fpx) or fpx<=0: continue
378	            adv = liq_l.at[dt, tk] if tk in liq_l.columns else 0
379	            if pd.isna(adv) or adv*fpx < LIQ_MIN: continue
380	            target = POS_PCT*nav_now
381	            cap = LIQ_CAP*adv*MAX_FILL*fpx
382	            alloc = min(target, cap)
383	            if alloc<1e6 or alloc>cash_l: continue
384	            eff_px = fpx*(1+SLIP_IN)
385	            shares = alloc/eff_px
386	            share_cost = shares*fpx           # CLEAN
387	            slip_cost = shares*fpx*SLIP_IN
388	            cash_l -= (share_cost + slip_cost)
389	            hid_seq += 1
390	            hid = f"{tk}_{dt.strftime('%Y%m%d')}_LAG{hid_seq:03d}"
391	            positions_l[tk] = {"entry_dt":dt,"exit_dt":en_row["exit_dt"],
392	                               "shares":shares,"entry_px":fpx,"holding_id":hid}
393	            events_lag.append({
394	                "ymd": dt, "ticker": tk, "action": "buy",
395	                "buy_amount": float(share_cost),
396	                "sell_amount": 0.0,
397	                "fee": float(slip_cost),
398	                "adj_price": float(fpx),
399	                "shares": float(shares),
400	                "holding_id": hid,
401	                "play_type": "LAGGED_HL3",
402	                "cash_after": float(cash_l),
403	                "reason": "LAGGED_ENTRY_T5",
404	                "book": "LAGGED",
405	            })
406	    # 3. EOD NAV
407	    mtm = 0.0
408	    for tk, p in positions_l.items():
409	        px = px_close.at[dt, tk] if tk in px_close.columns else np.nan
410	        if pd.isna(px): px = p["entry_px"]
411	        mtm += p["shares"]*px
412	    nav_history_l.append({"time":dt, "cash":cash_l, "positions_mv":mtm, "nav":cash_l+mtm, "n_pos":len(positions_l)})
413	
414	nav_lag = pd.DataFrame(nav_history_l)
415	nav_lag["time"] = pd.to_datetime(nav_lag["time"])
416	print(f"  LAGGED events: {len(events_lag)} (entries+exits)   final NAV: {nav_lag['nav'].iloc[-1]/1e9:.4f}B")
417	
418	# [BINARY_STRIPPED]
419	# 6. Merge BAL + LAGGED into combined transparent log
420	# [BINARY_STRIPPED]
421	print("\n[6] Merging logs + transactions...")
422	nav_b_s = nav_bal.set_index("time")["nav"]
423	nav_l_s = nav_lag.set_index("time")["nav"]
424	common = nav_b_s.index.intersection(nav_l_s.index)
425	combined_nav = nav_b_s.loc[common] + nav_l_s.loc[common]
426	
427	cash_b = nav_bal.set_index("time")["cash"].loc[common]
428	etf_b = nav_bal.set_index("time")["cash_etf"].loc[common]
429	stk_b = (nav_bal.set_index("time")["positions_mv"] + nav_bal.set_index("time")["pending_mv"]).loc[common]
430	n_pos_b = nav_bal.set_index("time")["n_pos"].loc[common]
431	
432	cash_l = nav_lag.set_index("time")["cash"].loc[common]
433	stk_l = nav_lag.set_index("time")["positions_mv"].loc[common]
434	n_pos_l = nav_lag.set_index("time")["n_pos"].loc[common]
435	
436	def annot(events, book):
437	    if not events: return pd.DataFrame()
438	    df = pd.DataFrame(events)
439	    if "book" not in df.columns: df["book"] = book
440	    return df
441	
442	events_all = pd.concat([annot(events_bal,"BAL")], ignore_index=True) if events_bal else pd.DataFrame()
443	if not events_all.empty: events_all["ymd"] = pd.to_datetime(events_all["ymd"])
444	etf_all = annot(etf_bal,"BAL")
445	
446	if not etf_all.empty:
447	    etf_tx = pd.DataFrame({
448	        "ymd": pd.to_datetime(etf_all["ymd"]),
449	        "ticker": "E1VFVN30",
450	        "action": etf_all["action"].apply(lambda a: "buy" if a=="buy_etf" else "sell"),
451	        "buy_amount": np.where(etf_all["action"]=="buy_etf", etf_all["amount_vnd"], 0.0),
452	        "sell_amount": np.where(etf_all["action"]=="sell_etf", etf_all["amount_vnd"], 0.0),
453	        "fee": etf_all["friction_cost"],
454	        "adj_price": etf_all["price_vn30"],
455	        "shares": etf_all["shares"],
456	        "holding_id": etf_all["holding_id"],
457	        "play_type": "ETF_PARK",
458	        "cash_after": etf_all["cash_after"],
459	        "reason": "ETF_REBAL_state" + etf_all["state"].astype(str),
460	        "book": "BAL",
461	    })
462	else:
463	    etf_tx = pd.DataFrame()
464	
465	lag_tx = annot(events_lag, "LAGGED")
466	if not lag_tx.empty: lag_tx["ymd"] = pd.to_datetime(lag_tx["ymd"])
467	
468	all_tx = pd.concat([events_all, etf_tx, lag_tx], ignore_index=True)
469	all_tx["ymd"] = pd.to_datetime(all_tx["ymd"])
470	all_tx = all_tx.sort_values(["ymd","book","action","ticker"]).reset_index(drop=True)
471	
472	tx_counts = all_tx.groupby(all_tx["ymd"]).size().cumsum()
473	n_tx_series = pd.Series(0, index=common, dtype=int)
474	for d, n in tx_counts.items():
475	    n_tx_series.loc[n_tx_series.index >= d] = int(n)
476	
477	combined_logs = pd.DataFrame({
478	    "ymd": common,
479	    "nav": combined_nav.values,
480	    "BAL_cash": cash_b.values, "BAL_stocks": stk_b.values, "BAL_etf": etf_b.values,
481	    "LAGGED_cash": cash_l.values, "LAGGED_stocks": stk_l.values,
482	    "cash": (cash_b + cash_l).values,
483	    "cash_etf": etf_b.values,
484	    "stocks_mv": (stk_b + stk_l).values,
485	    "num_holdings": (n_pos_b + n_pos_l).values,
486	    "num_transactions": n_tx_series.values,
487	    "state": pd.Series(common).map(state_ff).values,
488	})
489	print(f"  Combined: {len(combined_logs)} days, {len(all_tx)} transactions")
490	
491	# [BINARY_STRIPPED]
492	# 7. Save CSVs + open positions snapshot + MTM phantoms
493	# [BINARY_STRIPPED]
494	print("\n[7] Saving CSVs + open positions...")
495	os.makedirs(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data"), exist_ok=True)
496	
497	def safe_to_csv(df, path):
498	    try:
499	        df.to_csv(path, index=False)
500	        return path
501	    except PermissionError:
502	        alt = path.replace(".csv",".new.csv"); df.to_csv(alt, index=False); return alt
503	
504	logs_path = safe_to_csv(combined_logs, os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","pt_v12_dt4_logs.csv"))
505	
506	# Open positions: BAL stocks + BAL ETF lots + LAGGED stocks
507	open_bal = nav_bal.attrs.get("open_positions_final") if hasattr(nav_bal,"attrs") else None
508	etf_lots_bal = nav_bal.attrs.get("etf_lots_final") if hasattr(nav_bal,"attrs") else None
509	open_lag_rows = []
510	last_day = common[-1]
511	for tk, p in positions_l.items():
512	    last_px = px_close.at[last_day, tk] if tk in px_close.columns and pd.notna(px_close.at[last_day, tk]) else p["entry_px"]
513	    cost = p["shares"]*p["entry_px"]
514	    mark = p["shares"]*last_px
515	    open_lag_rows.append({"ticker":tk,"holding_id":p["holding_id"],"entry_date":p["entry_dt"],
516	                          "days_held":(last_day-p["entry_dt"]).days,"shares":p["shares"],
517	                          "last_price":last_px,"cost_basis":cost,"mark_value":mark,
518	                          "unrealised_pnl":mark-cost,
519	                          "unrealised_ret_pct":(mark/cost-1)*100 if cost>0 else 0,
520	                          "play_type":"LAGGED_HL3","book":"LAGGED"})
521	open_lag = pd.DataFrame(open_lag_rows)
522	
523	open_df = pd.concat([
524	    (open_bal.assign(book="BAL") if open_bal is not None and not open_bal.empty else pd.DataFrame()),
525	    (etf_lots_bal.assign(book="BAL") if etf_lots_bal is not None and not etf_lots_bal.empty else pd.DataFrame()),
526	    open_lag,
527	], ignore_index=True)
528	
529	# MTM phantom rows
530	mtm_rows = []
531	if open_bal is not None and not open_bal.empty:
532	    for _, p in open_bal.iterrows():
533	        mtm_rows.append({"ymd":last_day,"ticker":p["ticker"],"action":"sell",
534	            "buy_amount":0.0,"sell_amount":float(p["mark_value"]),"fee":0.0,
535	            "adj_price":float(p["last_price"]),"shares":float(p["shares"]),
536	            "holding_id":p["holding_id"],"play_type":p["play_type"],"cash_after":None,
537	            "reason":"MTM_UNREALIZED","book":"BAL"})
538	if etf_lots_bal is not None and not etf_lots_bal.empty:
539	    for _, lot in etf_lots_bal.iterrows():
540	        mtm_rows.append({"ymd":last_day,"ticker":"E1VFVN30","action":"sell",
541	            "buy_amount":0.0,"sell_amount":float(lot["mark_value"]),"fee":0.0,
542	            "adj_price":float(lot["last_price"]) if pd.notna(lot["last_price"]) else None,
543	            "shares":float(lot["shares"]),"holding_id":lot["holding_id"],
544	            "play_type":"ETF_PARK","cash_after":None,"reason":"MTM_UNREALIZED","book":"BAL"})
545	for r in open_lag_rows:
546	    mtm_rows.append({"ymd":last_day,"ticker":r["ticker"],"action":"sell",
547	        "buy_amount":0.0,"sell_amount":float(r["mark_value"]),"fee":0.0,
548	        "adj_price":float(r["last_price"]),"shares":float(r["shares"]),
549	        "holding_id":r["holding_id"],"play_type":"LAGGED_HL3","cash_after":None,
550	        "reason":"MTM_UNREALIZED","book":"LAGGED"})
551	if mtm_rows:
552	    mtm_df = pd.DataFrame(mtm_rows)
553	    all_tx = pd.concat([all_tx, mtm_df], ignore_index=True)
554	    all_tx = all_tx.sort_values(["ymd","book","action","ticker"]).reset_index(drop=True)
555	
556	tx_path = safe_to_csv(all_tx, os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","pt_v12_dt4_transactions.csv"))
557	open_path = safe_to_csv(open_df, os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","pt_v12_dt4_open_positions.csv"))
558	print(f"  {logs_path}")
559	print(f"  {tx_path}  (incl {len(mtm_rows)} MTM phantoms)")
560	print(f"  {open_path}: {len(open_df)} open positions")
561	
562	# [BINARY_STRIPPED]
563	# 8. Summary + reconciliation
564	# [BINARY_STRIPPED]
565	print("\n[8] Reconciliation")
566	final_nav = combined_nav.iloc[-1]
567	final_cash = (cash_b + cash_l).iloc[-1]
568	final_etf = etf_b.iloc[-1]
569	final_pos = stk_b.iloc[-1] + stk_l.iloc[-1]
570	years = (common[-1]-common[0]).days/365.25
571	cagr = (final_nav/TOTAL_NAV)**(1/years)-1
572	total_ret = (final_nav/TOTAL_NAV-1)*100
573	peak = combined_nav.cummax()
574	dd = ((combined_nav-peak)/peak).min()*100
575	
576	print(f"  Period: {common[0].date()} -> {common[-1].date()} ({years:.3f} years)")
577	print(f"  Init: {TOTAL_NAV/1e9:.2f}B   Final: {final_nav/1e9:.4f}B   ret={total_ret:+.2f}%   CAGR={cagr*100:+.2f}%   DD={dd:+.2f}%")
578	print(f"    cash {final_cash/1e9:.4f}B + ETF {final_etf/1e9:.4f}B + positions {final_pos/1e9:.4f}B")
579	
580	real_tx = all_tx[all_tx["reason"]!="MTM_UNREALIZED"]
581	stock_real = real_tx[real_tx["ticker"]!="E1VFVN30"]
582	etf_real_tx = real_tx[real_tx["ticker"]=="E1VFVN30"]
583	
584	stk_buy_amt = stock_real[stock_real["action"]=="buy"]["buy_amount"].sum()
585	stk_buy_fee = stock_real[stock_real["action"]=="buy"]["fee"].sum()
586	stk_sell_amt = stock_real[stock_real["action"]=="sell"]["sell_amount"].sum()
587	stk_sell_fee = stock_real[stock_real["action"]=="sell"]["fee"].sum()
588	etf_buy_amt = etf_real_tx[etf_real_tx["action"]=="buy"]["buy_amount"].sum()
589	etf_buy_fee = etf_real_tx[etf_real_tx["action"]=="buy"]["fee"].sum()
590	etf_sell_amt = etf_real_tx[etf_real_tx["action"]=="sell"]["sell_amount"].sum()
591	etf_sell_fee = etf_real_tx[etf_real_tx["action"]=="sell"]["fee"].sum()
592	
593	stk_out = stk_buy_amt + stk_buy_fee
594	stk_in  = stk_sell_amt - stk_sell_fee
595	etf_out = etf_buy_amt + etf_buy_fee
596	etf_in  = etf_sell_amt - etf_sell_fee
597	
598	mtm_sells = all_tx[all_tx["reason"]=="MTM_UNREALIZED"]
599	mtm_stocks = mtm_sells[mtm_sells["ticker"]!="E1VFVN30"]["sell_amount"].sum()
600	mtm_etf = mtm_sells[mtm_sells["ticker"]=="E1VFVN30"]["sell_amount"].sum()
601	
602	expected_cash = TOTAL_NAV - stk_out + stk_in - etf_out + etf_in
603	print()
604	print(f"  CASH-FLOW RECONCILIATION (from transactions CSV, excludes MTM_UNREALIZED):")
605	print(f"    STOCK: buys clean={stk_buy_amt/1e9:+.4f}B  buy_fee={stk_buy_fee/1e9:+.4f}B  sells clean={stk_sell_amt/1e9:+.4f}B  sell_fee={stk_sell_fee/1e9:+.4f}B")
606	print(f"      cash_out={stk_out/1e9:+.4f}B  cash_in={stk_in/1e9:+.4f}B  net realized P&L={(stk_in-stk_out)/1e9:+.4f}B")
607	print(f"    ETF:   buys clean={etf_buy_amt/1e9:+.4f}B  fee={etf_buy_fee/1e9:+.4f}B  sells clean={etf_sell_amt/1e9:+.4f}B  fee={etf_sell_fee/1e9:+.4f}B")
608	print(f"      cash_out={etf_out/1e9:+.4f}B  cash_in={etf_in/1e9:+.4f}B  net cash_flow={(etf_in-etf_out)/1e9:+.4f}B")
609	print(f"    MTM: open stock value={mtm_stocks/1e9:+.4f}B   open ETF value={mtm_etf/1e9:+.4f}B")
610	print()
611	print(f"  EXPECTED end cash = init - stk_out + stk_in - etf_out + etf_in = {expected_cash/1e9:+.4f}B")
612	print(f"  ACTUAL   end cash = {final_cash/1e9:+.4f}B")
613	print(f"  DIFF (ETF appreciation rebalanced into cash): {(final_cash-expected_cash)/1e9:+.4f}B")
614	print()
615	print(f"  FINAL NAV CHECK:")
616	print(f"    actual_cash {final_cash/1e9:+.4f}B + actual_ETF {final_etf/1e9:+.4f}B + open_stock_MTM {mtm_stocks/1e9:+.4f}B")
617	print(f"    = {(final_cash+final_etf+mtm_stocks)/1e9:+.4f}B   vs   sim NAV {final_nav/1e9:+.4f}B")
618	print(f"    delta: {(final_cash+final_etf+mtm_stocks - final_nav)/1e6:+.4f}M  (should be ~0)")
619	
620	print("\nDone. Now run analyze_portfolio.py to generate the full report.")
621
